name: Pizza Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown and drain the ground beef.
2. Cook and drain the pasta.
3. Add all ingredients to a large bowl and mix well.
4. Transfer the mixture to either a large casserole dish or two 8-inch by 8-inch pans.
5. Sprinkle with additional Parmesan.
6. Bake at 350°F for 30 minutes.
